steps.title: Compute the intercept
steps.content: So the $y$-intercept is $\left(0,\tfrac{8}{13}\right)$. That matches choice D — D is correct.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to match the computed result to the answer choices. The value or equation found above matches choice D, $(0,\frac{8}{13})$. The other choices do not satisfy the same condition from the question, so D is correct.
